input_schema.description: A cat picture to evaluate for frame dominance.
A cat picture to evaluate for proportional presence.
A cat picture to evaluate for positional authority.
A cat picture to evaluate for subject isolation.

description: Evaluates how thoroughly a cat dominates the frame of a photograph, returning a score from 0 to 1. Synthesizes three qualities — proportional presence, positional authority, and subject isolation — to answer whether the picture is truly about the cat.
